title: VPN Client & Service Test Coverage Implementation
description: Comprehensive unit and integration test coverage for both VPN client (cellframe-srv-vpn-client) and VPN service (cellframe-sdk). Implementation of complete test infrastructure including unit tests, integration tests, mocks, and fixtures for all critical components.

phases.name: Test Infrastructure Analysis & Planning
phases.description: Detailed analysis of VPN client and service code to identify testable components and create comprehensive test plan
phases.completion_summary: Analyzed 27 modules (9,946 total LOC). Created coverage matrices: Client (196 unit + 25 integration tests), Service (80 unit + 15 integration tests). Total estimated: 316 tests. Average target coverage: 88.5%.

subphases.name: VPN Client Code Analysis
subphases.completion_summary: Analyzed 16 VPN client modules (6,103 total LOC): State Machine (1698 LOC), Core modules (5), Network modules (6), Payment modules (4), Protocol modules (2), IPC modules (3), Service layer (2). Documented all states, events, functions, and test requirements.

states: VPN_STATE_ROUTING_SETUP (3) - Setting up routing table entries
VPN_STATE_CONNECTED (4) - Active VPN tunnel, data transfer
VPN_STATE_CONNECTION_LOST (5) - Connection dropped, deciding next action

public_api_functions: vpn_sm_init() - Allocate and initialize state machine
vpn_sm_deinit() - Cleanup and free state machine
vpn_sm_transition() - Process event and change state

exit_functions: state_connected_exit() - Stop keepalive, backup network config

thread_safety.protected_operations: All state transitions, parameter updates, statistics access
thread_safety.callback_execution: Callbacks executed outside mutex to prevent deadlocks

error_conditions: NULL state machine pointer - graceful handling
Max reconnect attempts - transitions to DISCONNECTED
Memory allocation failures - logged, state preserved

vpn_state_handlers.c.purpose: State entry/exit handlers for state machine lifecycle
key_functions: state_connect_failed_entry() - Error handling and retry logic
state_connected_exit() - Stop keepalive, backup network config
test_requirements: Test each state entry function with mocked dependencies
Test state exit functions cleanup properly
Test callbacks trigger correct state transitions
Test cleanup helpers handle NULL pointers

key_functions: vpn_client_payment_tx_create() - Create payment transaction (called from state_connecting_entry)
validation_rules: payment_token must be non-NULL and non-empty
service_units must be non-zero (checked via IS_ZERO_256 macro)
Fail-fast approach: NO default values, explicit parameters required
test_requirements: Test TX creation with valid wallet and network

vpn_state_tunnel.c.purpose: Bidirectional packet forwarding between TUN device and stream channel
vpn_state_tunnel.c.architecture: Thread-safe, worker-affinity aware using dap_net_tun channel_info

packet_flow.outgoing: Local network stack → TUN device → vpn_tun_data_received_callback → dap_stream_ch_pkt_write_mt → VPN server
packet_flow.incoming: VPN server → Stream channel → vpn_stream_data_received_callback → dap_net_tun_write → Local network stack

statistics_tracking: Updated on each successful packet transfer
test_requirements: Test packet size validation and fragmentation
Test statistics update on each transfer
Test debug logging when s_debug_more enabled
Test error handling (NULL pointers, invalid sizes)
Test thread-safety with concurrent packet arrivals

vpn_client.c.purpose: Main VPN client library API implementation
initialization_flow: 3. Store init params (debug_more, timeouts, reconnect policy)
test_requirements: Test vpn_client_init() with NULL params (use defaults)
Test all public API functions with initialized/uninitialized library
Test version functions return correct values

vpn_tun.c.purpose: TUN device management wrapper around dap_net_tun unified API
vpn_tun.c.description: Adapter between VPN client and DAP SDK unified TUN API, reduced from 711 to 282 LOC by using dap_net_tun
key_functions: vpn_tun_create() - Create TUN device with configuration
test_requirements: Test TUN device creation with valid config
Test TUN device creation with invalid config

key_functions: vpn_uplink_create() - Create uplink with server address, port, protocol
vpn_uplink_update_stats() - Update throughput, latency, packet loss
vpn_uplink_check_health() - Calculate health status based on metrics
vpn_uplink_state_to_string() - Convert state enum to string (7 states)
vpn_uplink_health_to_string() - Convert health enum to string (5 levels)
uplink_states: UPLINK_STATE_VERIFYING - Speed test and connectivity verification
UPLINK_STATE_STANDBY - Connected but not actively used
test_requirements: Test vpn_uplink_check_health() for all 5 health levels
Test health threshold boundaries (99ms vs 100ms, etc.)
Test health_to_string() for all 5 health levels

vpn_uplink_pool.c.purpose: Uplink pool manager with load balancing and health monitoring
key_functions: vpn_uplink_pool_create() - Create pool with default config
vpn_uplink_pool_create_ext() - Create pool with custom config
vpn_uplink_pool_check_health_all() - Health check for all uplinks

health_monitoring.degraded_detection: Marks uplinks as degraded when health < FAIR
health_monitoring.automatic_failover: Switches to backup uplink on failure

test_requirements: Test pool_create() with default and custom config
Test callbacks fired on state/health changes

vpn_backup.c.description: Backs up original network config before VPN, restores on disconnect

test_requirements: Test platform-specific routing (Linux ip, macOS route, etc.)

vpn_multihop_tx.c.key_function: vpn_multihop_tx_set_create() - Creates array of payment TXs for route

vpn_ipc_server.c.transport: Unix domain socket (/var/run/cellframe-vpn-clientd.sock) or Windows named pipe

test_requirements: Test service init with valid config
Test service init with invalid config
Test each callback with mocked inputs

subphases.name: VPN Service (SDK) Code Analysis
subphases.completion_summary: Analyzed 11 VPN service modules (3,843 total LOC): Core (526), Stream (547), TUN (433), Session (263), Address Pool (304), Multi-hop (423), Limits (259), Traffic (365), Callbacks (587), Common (44), CMD (92). All modules analyzed with test requirements defined.

test_requirements: Test service init with valid config
Test service init with invalid config
Test each callback with mocked inputs

subphases.name: Test Coverage Matrix Creation
subphases.completion_summary: Created matrices for Client (8 modules, 196 unit tests) and Service (5 module groups, 80 unit tests). Total estimated: 276 unit tests + 40 integration tests.

tasks.task: Create VPN Client Test Coverage Matrix
Create VPN Service Test Coverage Matrix

details: Payment flow (create TX, submit, validate receipt)

subphases.name: Mock & Fixture Requirements Definition
subphases.completion_summary: Defined all required mocks (6 categories) and fixtures (8 categories) for VPN client and service testing. Mock requirements include DAP SDK APIs (Stream, Chain, Events, TUN, Config, Crypto). Fixture requirements include connection params, payment TXs, receipts, VPN packets (11 opcodes), TUN packets, state sequences, and IPC JSON-RPC samples.

details: - Invalid params (NULL fields, invalid port, empty network_name)
- Single-hop payment TX (one hop, one payment)
- Multi-hop payment TX set (3 hops, 3 payments)
- Payment with different unit types (MB, seconds)
- Reconnect path: CONNECTED -> CONNECTION_LOST -> RECONNECTING -> CONNECTED

subphases.name: DAP SDK Mock Framework Implementation
subphases.completion_summary: Created reusable mock framework in DAP SDK test-framework/mocks/ with 10 API functions, 9 helper macros, thread-safe implementation, full DAP SDK standards compliance. Library successfully compiled and integrated into VPN client tests. Zero technical debt.

core: dap_mock_framework.h (92 LOC) - Public API with 13 functions and 9 macros
CMakeLists.txt (18 LOC) - Build configuration for libdap_test_mocks.a
README.md (300+ LOC) - Comprehensive API documentation with examples
infrastructure: tests/mocks/CMakeLists.txt - VPN client alias: add_library(vpn_test_mocks ALIAS dap_test_mocks)

api_functions.name: dap_mock_framework_init
api_functions.description: Initialize mock framework, allocate resources, setup mutexes

api_functions.name: dap_mock_framework_deinit
api_functions.description: Cleanup framework, free all registered mocks, destroy mutexes

api_functions.name: dap_mock_framework_reset_all
api_functions.description: Reset all registered mocks (call counts, history)

api_functions.name: dap_mock_register
api_functions.description: Register new mock function, allocate state, initialize mutex
api_functions.returns: Pointer to mock state or NULL on error

api_functions.name: dap_mock_record_call
api_functions.description: Record function call with timestamp, arguments (up to 10), return value

api_functions.name: dap_mock_get_call_count
api_functions.description: Get number of times mock was called

api_functions.name: dap_mock_get_last_call
api_functions.description: Retrieve last call record with all arguments and return value
api_functions.returns: Pointer to last call or NULL

api_functions.name: dap_mock_reset
api_functions.description: Reset single mock (clear call history, reset counters)

api_functions.name: dap_mock_was_called_with
api_functions.description: Verify if mock was called with specific argument value
api_functions.returns: true if argument matches, false otherwise

helper_macros: DAP_MOCK_DECLARE(func_name) - Declare static mock state variable g_mock_##func_name
DAP_MOCK_INIT(func_name) - Register and initialize mock: g_mock_##func_name = dap_mock_register(#func_name)
DAP_MOCK_SET_RETURN(func_name, value) - Set return value for mock
DAP_MOCK_RECORD_CALL(func_name, args, arg_count, ret) - Record call with arguments

fields: const char *function_name - Name of mocked function
uint64_t timestamp - Call timestamp (microseconds since epoch)
void *args[10] - Array of up to 10 function arguments (type-erased)
bool enabled - Whether mock is active
int call_count - Total number of calls
int max_calls - Maximum calls to track (DAP_MOCK_MAX_CALLS = 100)
pthread_mutex_t lock - Per-function mutex for thread safety

implementation: Per-function mutex (state->lock) for call recording and verification
No global locks during high-frequency operations (minimal overhead)

capacity.description: Configurable via DAP_MOCK_MAX_CALLS and DAP_MOCK_MAX_REGISTERED macros

conventions_followed: dap_ prefix for all public functions and types
g_ prefix for global variables in macros
l_ prefix for local variables in functions
a_ prefix for all function parameters
DAP_NEW() / DAP_DELETE() for memory management (when integrated)
UNUSED() macro for intentionally unused parameters

features.technical_debt: Zero - clean implementation, no workarounds, no temporary solutions

vpn_client_usage.integration_point: tests/CMakeLists.txt adds DAP SDK test-framework as subdirectory

sections: API Reference - All 10 functions with signatures
Usage Example - Complete workflow (declare, init, enable, verify, reset)
Integration Guide - For Cellframe SDK and external projects
Macros - All 9 helper macros with descriptions
Integration Guide - Usage in Cellframe SDK and VPN client
Build System - CMake variables and targets
Coding Standards - Prefixes, logging, memory, error handling
Usage Examples - Unit test and integration test examples
Extending the Framework - Guidelines for new components

available_to: Cellframe SDK modules (VPN service, wallet, chain, net)
reusability.transparent_usage: Projects using Cellframe SDK as submodule get mock framework automatically via test-framework subdirectory

immediate: Use mock framework in test_vpn_state_machine.c for DAP SDK dependencies
Create specific mock implementations for dap_client, dap_stream_ch, dap_net_tun
future: Add more helper macros as needed (e.g., DAP_MOCK_VERIFY_CALL_SEQUENCE)
Implement mock function call sequence verification
Create common mock libraries for frequently used DAP SDK modules

details: Call tracking with argument storage (void* array)
DAP SDK coding standards compliance from the start

files: mocks/README.md (300+ LOC) - Full API reference with usage examples
test-framework/README.md (200+ LOC) - Framework overview and integration guide

changes: Updated tests/CMakeLists.txt to include DAP SDK test framework subdirectory

verification_steps: ✅ No compilation warnings in mock framework code

phases.name: VPN Client Unit Tests - Core Modules
phases.description: Unit tests for VPN client core functionality: state machine, connection management, TUN device

tests: test_vpn_sm_init() - Test vpn_sm_init() allocation and initialization
test_vpn_sm_state_transitions() - Test all 10 states: DISCONNECTED -> CONNECTING -> VERIFYING_CONNECTIVITY -> ROUTING_SETUP -> CONNECTED
test_vpn_sm_invalid_transitions() - Test invalid state transitions are rejected
test_vpn_sm_event_processing() - Test all 14 events: USER_CONNECT, USER_DISCONNECT, CONNECTION_SUCCESS, etc.
test_vpn_sm_register_callback() - Test state change callback registration
test_vpn_sm_callbacks_triggered() - Verify callbacks are called on state changes
test_vpn_sm_concurrent_events() - Test thread-safety with pthread mutex
test_vpn_sm_reconnect_behavior() - Test reconnection with max_attempts, delays
test_vpn_client_init() - Test vpn_client_init() with valid/NULL params
test_vpn_client_start() - Test vpn_client_start() with various params
test_vpn_client_invalid_params() - Negative tests for all functions
test_vpn_uplink_create() - Test uplink creation with valid params
test_vpn_uplink_destroy() - Test uplink cleanup and resource freeing
test_vpn_uplink_update_stats() - Test stats update (throughput, latency, packet_loss)
test_uplink_state_to_string() - Test state enum to string conversion
test_uplink_health_to_string() - Test health enum to string conversion
test_obfuscation_detection() - Obfuscation level detection and selection

phases.name: VPN Service (SDK) Unit Tests
phases.description: Unit tests for VPN service modules in cellframe-sdk

tests: test_dap_chain_net_srv_vpn_init() - Test service initialization with config
test_vpn_srv_ch_delete() - Channel cleanup and IP lease release
test_packet_invalid_size() - Handle packets with invalid sizes
test_packet_routing_by_ip() - Packet routing based on destination IP
test_stream_channel_stats_update() - Statistics update on packet processing
test_vpn_srv_tun_create() - TUN device creation with unified API
test_vpn_srv_tun_data_received_callback() - Process data from TUN device
test_vpn_srv_es_tun_read() - Read packets from TUN and route to clients
test_vpn_srv_es_tun_write() - Write packets to TUN device
test_tun_routing_by_destination_ip() - Route packets based on IP header
test_tun_client_lookup() - Client lookup by IPv4 address
test_tun_inter_worker_messaging() - TUN socket messages between workers

test_multi_hop_payment() - Multi-hop payment TX set creation

phases.name: DAP SDK Transport Protocol Tests
phases.description: Unit and integration tests for DAP SDK transport layer (HTTP, UDP, future transports)

tests: test_http_handshake() - Test encryption handshake over HTTP
test_http_session_create() - Test session creation over HTTP
test_http_data_write() - Test data writing over HTTP
test_http_data_read() - Test data reading from HTTP stream
test_http_ssl_upgrade() - Test HTTP to HTTPS upgrade
test_quic_connection_migration() - Connection migration on network change
test_quic_multiplexing() - Multiple streams over single connection
test_dns_encoding() - Data encoding in DNS queries
test_dns_decoding() - Data extraction from DNS responses
test_dns_query_types() - Different DNS record types (TXT, NULL, etc.)
test_dns_fragmentation() - Large data fragmentation across multiple queries
test_http_to_udp_switch() - Switch from HTTP to UDP transport
test_transport_failover() - Failover to backup transport on error
test_transport_selection_by_network() - Transport selection based on network type
test_concurrent_connections() - Multiple concurrent connections per transport

phases.name: Test Infrastructure & Automation
phases.description: Test automation, CI/CD integration, and reporting

components_covered: VPN Client Network Modules (Uplink, Uplink Pool, Backup, Registry, Routing)
VPN Client Payment Modules (Payment, Multi-hop TX, Receipt, Wallet)
VPN Client Service Layer (Auto-connect, Balance Monitor)
VPN Service Stream Processing (11 Packet Opcodes)
VPN Service TUN Management (Unified TUN API)
DAP SDK Future Transports (UDP_RELIABLE, QUIC, WebSocket, TLS, DNS_TUNNEL, OBFS4)

notes: Tests use DAP SDK testing framework (dap_test.h with dap_assert_PIF macro)
Both projects (client and service) maintain separate test suites
Integration tests may require elevated privileges for TUN device operations
Platform-specific tests should be conditionally compiled based on target OS
Mock implementations should be minimal but functionally complete
Coverage reports should be generated separately for client and service
Transport tests cover both implemented (HTTP, UDP_BASIC) and planned (6 future) transports
Future transport tests serve as specification and implementation guidance
Obfuscation tests should verify DPI evasion effectiveness
Performance tests should establish baseline metrics for regression detection
All transport tests must verify ops vtable contract compliance
